commands.review_summary:
The branch regenerates Swift gateway protocol models for optional session/chat `agentId` fields, removes Tokenjuice from the root shrinkwrap, and updates focused CI, lint, type, and test expectations across gateway, agents, codex-supervisor, commands, and setup tests.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +24, Other +83. Total +109 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: Source inspection gives a medium-confidence path: current schemas already contain optional `agentId` fields that the current Swift generated output lacks. I did not run the CI lanes in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs maintainer/security handling for the dirty merge state and dependency graph approval; there is no safe automated close or repair lane from this review.

target.title: fix ci mainline checks
target.body:
## Summary

- Regenerate the Swift Gateway protocol model output for the new optional session/chat `agentId` fields, and keep those additive Swift initializer parameters source-compatible with `= nil` defaults.
- Refresh the root `npm-shrinkwrap.json` after Tokenjuice was externalized and update the official plugin onboarding test expectation for Tokenjuice.
- Fix the mainline lint/type/test failures in `chat-abort`, OpenAI tool schema caching, codex-supervisor narrowing/string conversion, bash exec-host test typing, and the `global` session sentinel expectation.

## CI failures addressed

- `checks-fast-bundled-protocol`: regenerated `apps/shared/OpenClawKit/Sources/OpenClawProtocol/GatewayModels.swift` from the gateway protocol schema.
- `check-additional-runtime-topology-architecture`: changed `src/gateway/chat-abort.ts` to import the narrow `OpenClawConfig` type from `types.openclaw` instead of the config runtime module.
- `check-guards`: refreshed the root shrinkwrap so the root package no longer locks `tokenjuice`.
- `checks-node-core-runtime-media-ui`: added Tokenjuice to the official optional plugin onboarding test expectation.
- `check-lint`: removed the redundant `unknown | undefined` return and codex-supervisor lint issues.
- `check-prod-types` / `check-additional-extension-package-boundary`: made codex-supervisor integer narrowing explicit.
- `check-test-types`: typed the exec approval test mock result so allowlist fixtures no longer infer as `never`.
- `checks-node-agentic-commands-agent-channel`: updated the embedded agent command test to preserve `global` as the unscoped session sentinel; `isUnscopedSessionKeySentinel()` intentionally handles `global` before agent scoping.

## Verification

- `pnpm install` - completed; dependencies were missing in this new worktree (`tsx` was unavailable before install).
- `pnpm format extensions/codex-supervisor/src/plugin-tools.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec-host-node.test.ts src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.ts src/wizard/setup.official-plugins.test.ts` - passed.
- `pnpm format:check scripts/protocol-gen-swift.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/plugin-tools.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec-host-node.test.ts src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.ts src/wizard/setup.official-plugins.test.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/wizard/setup.official-plugins.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec-host-node.test.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/plugin-tools.test.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts` - passed, 8 files / 201 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts` - passed, 2 files / 78 tests.
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check` - passed, root `npm-shrinkwrap.json` is current.
- `pnpm protocol:check` - passed.
- `node --import tsx scripts/check-import-cycles.ts` - passed, 0 runtime value cycles.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/codex-supervisor/src/plugin-tools.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/check-extension-plugin-sdk-boundary.mjs --mode=src-outside-plugin-sdk` - passed, no extension plugin-sdk boundary violations.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo && node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo` - extension prod typecheck passed, then the broader extension test typecheck failed only on unrelated existing timer-cast errors in `extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/client.retry.test.ts`, `extensions/xiaomi/speech-provider.test.ts`, `extensions/zai/detect.test.ts`, and `extensions/zalo/src/api.test.ts`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean after fixing the generated Swift initializer compatibility finding.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Mainline CI failures from stale generated protocol output, stale shrinkwrap, import-cycle/lint/type issues, and stale test expectations.
Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree on macOS with repo wrappers and focused Vitest/tsgo/protocol/shrinkwrap checks.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests and checks pass; protocol and shrinkwrap generators report current/stable output; autoreview reports no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: The reported failures are addressed in the touched lanes.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check` / full CI locally; broad extension test typecheck remains blocked by unrelated timer-cast errors listed above.
target.author: romneyda
